metadata.name: dagster-papertrail
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Package for papertrail Dagster framework components.

functions.name: dagster_papertrail.loggers.papertrail_logger
documentation:
Use this logger to configure your Dagster job to log to Papertrail. You'll need an
active Papertrail account with URL and port.

Example:
.. code-block:: python

> @job(logger_defs={
>
> : "console": colored_console_logger,
>   "papertrail": papertrail_logger,
>
> })
> def simple_job():
>
> > ...
>
> simple_job.execute_in_process(
>
> : run_config={
>
>   : "loggers": {
>
>     : "console": {
>
>       : "config": {
>
>         : "log_level": "INFO",
>
>         }
>
>       },
>       "papertrail": {
>
>       > "config": {
>       >
>       > : "log_level": "INFO",
>       >   "name": "hello_job",
>       >   "papertrail_address": "127.0.0.1",
>       >   "papertrail_port": 12345,
>       >
>       > }
>
>       },
>
>     }
>
>   }
>
> )
